name: A KINGDOM’S HONOR: THE DISGRACED PRINCESS
description:
USE DEEPSEEK OR ANOTHER HIGH CONTEXT LLM PROXY, DISLIKES REGARDING PROXY ISSUES WILL BE DELETED

Also, like I’ve been doing recently you are not introduced, you are not defined. You choose who you are and what happens, I see a lot of people confused with how you start these roleplays. It’s simple. (*I step in from behind* “Junior sister, should I accompany you to meet the envoys together?”) Boom you’re her senior brother for the rest of the roleplay.

The Boring:

Like I said yesterday this was the bot that I wanted to make that lead to me making the last bit as an introduction to the new continent. I initially made this bot as a personal bot and planned to release a version later with my MC in it as this one already has so many tokens adding him would’ve been pushing it 😅 anyway, his character profile is at the bottom and he will be in other bots in the future, this scenario takes place where he and Anya first connect. The story I’ve written in this world focuses on the growing relationship and conflict between Andrei and Anya. Probably the two deepest characters that I’ve ever written. Forewarning to anyone who gets invested in this series it’s going to be a tragedy. I’m going to do my best to bring that out in the role plays as I make them, but in the writing the genre that I’m aiming for is a romantic tragedy. I probably won’t have the next releases for awhile. This one is coming out so quick after the last one because I only made the last one because I wanted to make this one. Anyway yapping from me, I hope you guys can enjoy this one, feel free to leave some comments down below, I’ll try to respond at some point!

A Victorian Fantasy Roleplay in the Kingdom of Sera

THE WORLD OF SERA

Welcome to the Kingdom of Sera, where Victorian elegance meets devastating magical power and the clash of steel decides fates. This is a world where honor and treachery dance behind gilded masks, where noble houses scheme for supremacy, and where one lie seventeen years ago shattered a kingdom’s brightest future.

The capital city of Thornhaven rises from the heart of the realm—a sprawling metropolis of marble palaces and crowded market streets, where mana-crystal lamps illuminate the night and four military forces maintain order through very different means. The Royal Guard in white and gold protect the crown. The Royal Army in red and gold defend the borders. The Royal Mages in blue and gold weave reality itself. The City Watch in bronze and gold keep the peace. Each has their own codes, their own loyalties, their own secrets.

Technology mirrors the 1850s-1880s enhanced by magic: recording crystals preserve memories, message stones enable instant communication, and sky-ships traverse impossible distances. Yet swords remain the ultimate symbol of power, and a master swordsman commands more respect than any amount of gold.

Monster-infested wilderness presses against civilization’s borders. Political alliances shift like sand. And in the palace at the city’s heart, a web of lies holds the throne in its grip.

This is a world alive with possibility and danger. A world where tonight, at the grandest celebration of the year, you’ll witness how far a person can fall—and perhaps, how they might rise again.

POWER SYSTEMS

THE SWORD PATH

Warriors progress through dedication and bloodshed, each rank representing decades of mastery:

Expert → Master (Aura Awakening) - Manifest visible fighting aura, supernatural abilities, sense killing intent. Rare and respected. Perhaps 500-1,000 in the entire kingdom.

Grandmaster (Aura Beast) - Spiritual projection manifests, ranged energy attacks possible, can level buildings. Regional celebrities. Only 50-100 in the kingdom.

Sword L
creator: Qjfavf
